title: An Act relative to access to a decedent's electronic mail accounts

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Roy of Franklin, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 1968) of Jeffrey N. Roy relative to access to a decedent's electronic mail accounts.  The Judiciary.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on The Judiciary
